matrix.evidence: SKILL.md contains evidence patterns for all 10 commandments (lines 85-155), each with Grep/Glob/Bash/Check instructions
SKILL.md references commandments.md via Glob discovery; commandments.md contains 10x5 maturity levels (50 matches for 'Level/maturity')
SKILL.md Phase 2 uses WebSearch for stack-specific practices; actionables section requires 'SPECIFIC tech stack' references; fallback labeled [General Best Practice]
SKILL.md actionables ordered by 'impact score = (level gap x commandment criticality) / effort'; Effort Low/Medium/High specified
SKILL.md Phase 1 scans package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, build.gradle, Gemfile, composer.json, *.csproj, mix.exs, deno.json
SKILL.md Phase 2 runs 3-5 WebSearch queries with format '[Framework] [topic] best practices [year]'; 6 WebSearch references in skill
.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with name 'engineering-commandments'; skills/commandments/SKILL.md auto-discoverable
SKILL.md Phase 3 uses 'Agent tool (subagent_type: Explore)' in parallel clusters of 3-4; per-commandment evidence patterns include Grep/Glob/Bash/Check
SKILL.md Phase 4 writes to 'claudedocs/commandments-report.md'; 2 references to this path
commandments.md exists at plugin root (bundled); SKILL.md discovers via 'Glob: **/commandments.md'
Phase 1 scans 13+ manifest formats; fallback to file extensions/directory structure; SKILL.md labels unknown stacks as fallback
SKILL.md frontmatter: name=commandments, triggers on '/commandments'; pipeline runs 4 phases automatically
Each assessment requires 'Level assigned', 'Evidence found (specific file paths, patterns, counts)', 'Evidence missing'
Report template includes '## Assessment History' table; existing report handling reads and appends history
Report template includes Tech Stack table, Maturity Summary, Detailed Assessments with rationale, and self-contained structure
SKILL.md Phase 2: 'Using ONLY technology names (never internal code details)'; TN3 resolution enforces this
SKILL.md: 'Only READ codebase files for analysis. Never modify source code. The only file written is the report'; Edit removed from allowed-tools
README.md documents '/plugin install' and '--plugin-dir' installation; standard .claude-plugin/ structure
allowed-tools: Read, Write, Grep, Glob, Bash, Agent, WebSearch -- all built-in Claude Code tools; no external CLIs
SKILL.md Existing Report Handling: reads existing history, generates new assessment, appends previous summary to history section
